admission process jiseee requirements ru: JIS University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and Ph.D. programs. You can apply online via the official website (jisuniversity.ac.in) or visit the campus admission cell.
Admissions are based on merit and entrance exams like JISUEE, WBJEE, or JEE Main depending on the course.
campus life hostels clubs sports facilit: The JIS University campus features modern labs, a well-stocked central library, digital classrooms, separate hostels for boys and girls, and sports facilities.
Campus life is vibrant with various clubs (cultural, technical, sports) and our annual fest!
examination routines dates semester sche: Semester examinations are conducted twice a year (Odd Semesters in Nov/Dec and Even Semesters in May/June). Check the student portal for exam routines.
Make sure to maintain a minimum of 75% attendance to be eligible for university examinations.
courses streams btech bba mba pharmacy l: JIS University offers programs in Engineering (B.Tech), Management (BBA/MBA), Pharmacy, Science, Law, and Hospitality management.
location address routing maps where is i: JIS University is located at Agarpara, Kolkata, West Bengal (Near Kalyani Expressway).
placement cell jobs package companies sa: JIS University has a dedicated training and placement cell that conducts mock interviews and personality development classes.
Top recruiters include TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, and many core engineering and pharma companies.
hi hello hey greetings good morning stat: Hello! Welcome to the upgraded CHATJIS terminal. Ask me any direct questions about admissions, campus environments, or academic examination procedures.
Greetings from CHATJIS! Ask me anything about admissions, exams, or campus life.
bye goodbye exit thank you clear close: Thank you for using CHATJIS! Best of luck with your studies.
Goodbye! Have a great day at campus!
fees structure cost tuition semester fee: The fee structure varies by course. You can check the detailed fee breakdown for each program on the JIS University official website.
JIS University offers various scholarships based on academic merit, sports quota, and government schemes like the Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship.
transport bus facility route commute tra: JIS University provides dedicated transport facilities with buses plying across major routes in Kolkata and surrounding areas.
Students can opt for the transport facility during admission or at the start of the semester by contacting the transport department.
library books digital resources reading: The central library is well-equipped with thousands of books, journals, and e-resources. The reading room is open during college hours for all students.
Students can access the digital library portal for research papers and e-books using their university credentials.
faculty teachers professors hod dean con: JIS University boasts highly qualified faculty members from reputed institutions. Many hold Ph.D.s and have extensive industry experience.
You can find contact details for respective Deans and HODs in the departmental section of the university website.
syllabus academic calendar holidays vaca: The academic calendar and detailed course syllabus are provided to students at the beginning of each semester.
Holiday lists and vacation schedules (summer/winter breaks) are published on the official notice board and student portal.
